problem id: 3400e0d5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHL(5)

examples:
  10011101 -> 11000111
  00010000 -> 00000100
  10010110 -> 01100101
  11100101 -> 11011001
  00101100 -> 10001011
  01111011 -> 10111110
  01110011 -> 10111100
  01010011 -> 10110100

query: 01110100
predicted answer: 10011101
